content: On March 14, 2024, the container ship MV Epsilon transited the Narrows Strait carrying 4,200 containers of medical supplies. The autopilot used float64 EKF that lost positive definiteness after 8 minutes, drifting 200 meters east. 47,000 vessels carry the same risk.
